HomePage.title:
Welcome to the
Luxor Economy.
HomePage.subtitle: Luxor (LXR) drives the Excelsior ecosystem as its public liquidity engine. Designed for utility, stability, and growth directly on Solana.

reserve.title: Real World Backing
reserve.description: Luxor represents liquidity in a vast ecosystem secured by real-world assets and transparent on-chain governance.

liquidity.title: Liquidity Engine
liquidity.description: With a supply of 2.025B, LXR facilitates seamless, high-volume transactions across the entire ecosystem.

speed.title: Solana Speed & Security
speed.description: Leveraging Solana's Token-2022 program for enforceable royalties, secure transfers, and sub-second finality.

allocation.title: Transparent Allocation
allocation.description: Our distribution model ensures long-term sustainability. The vast majority of tokens are held in the secure Squads Multisig Vault to support market stability.
